seed_rate.notes: 18-22 kg/ha is sufficient to maintain standard plant density.

sowing.soil_conditions: Well-drained silty loam to clay loam soils with high organic matter, pH 6.0-7.0.

irrigation.notes: Ensure moderate moisture to support stem development.
Critical water phase. Moisture stress during tasseling drastically drops yield.
Critical phase. Support cob grain filling.

fertilizer.method: Band placement during sowing line creation
fertilizer.notes: Incorporate full P and K doses with 25% of the Nitrogen dose basal.
Apply nitrogen along the plant row after light weeding.
Boosts grain development in the cobs.

maturity_indicators: Husk cover turns yellow and papery dry
Black layer forms at the tip of the maize kernels
harvest.harvest_method: Manual plucking of cobs followed by crop cutting
harvest.notes: Dry harvested cobs in the sun before dehusking and shelling to lower moisture to 14% for storage.
